name: Olive Garden Salad Dressing
recipeIngredient: 1 large Raw egg, or egg beaters
recipeInstructions: Blend all ingredients in a blender on high speed for 1/2 minute until smooth. Pour the mixture into a saucepan set over simmering water and stir gently with a whisk until it thickens and eggs are cooked through. Chill several hours or overnight before using. If needed, thin the dressing by adding more Italian dressing. Combine equal amounts of fresh spinach, iceberg lettuce, and romaine lettuce for each salad. Moisten leaves with dressing, but do not saturate; let stand 5 minutes. Add onion rings, radishes, etc.
